title: Human Granzyme B (CTLA-1) ELISA assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6pg81","text":"This protocol describes an ELISA assay  for measurement of Granzyme B (CTLA-1) in supernatants collected from T cell dependent cytotoxicity (TDCC) cultures after BiTE® treatment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Granzyme B (CTLA-1)Human ELISA Kit, Abcam, P/N ab46142, Lot # GR149011-8 Granzyme B Microplate (12 x 8 well strips) Granzyme B Standard 10X Standard Diluent Buffer Biotinylated anti-Granzyme B Biotinylated Antibody Diluent Streptavidin-HRP HRP Diluent 200X Wash Buffer Chromogen TMB Substrate Solution Stop Reagent Distilled or deionized water

Prepare Wash Buffer (1X Wash Buffer in DI Water): 1.0 ml 200X Wash buffer + 199 mL Water Prepare 1X Standard Diluent Buffer: Dilute the 10X Standard Diluent Buffer 10-fold in distilled water before use (400 µL 10X Standard Diluent + 3.6 mL distilled water)
Prepare a 1,000 pg/mL Standard #1 by reconstituting the lyophilized Granzyme B standard with the volume indicated on the vial using the appropriate 1X Standard Diluent Buffer %s %s
Add 100 µl of Standard to the appropriate wells of the plate
Add 100 µl of Neat Sample to the appropriate wells of the plate
Add 50 µl of Biotin Antibody Solution to each well Seal the plate Cover with a plate sealer Incubate for 3 hours at room temperature

After incubation, wash the plate 3X with 1X Wash Buffer using a plate washer Aspirate the liquid from each well. Add 0.3 μL of 1X Wash Buffer into each well Aspirate the liquid from each well. Repeat for a total of 3 washes. Blot plate on a paper towel
Add 100 µl of Streptavidin Solution to each well Seal the plate Cover with aluminum foil Incubate for 30 minutes at room temperature

After incubation, wash the plate 3X with Wash Buffer using a plate washer Aspirate the liquid from each well. Add 0.3 μL of 1X Wash Buffer into each well Aspirate the liquid from each well. Repeat for a total of 3 washes. Blot plate on a paper towel

Add 100 µl Chromogen TMB substrate solution to each well of the plate Incubate in the dark for 10-20 minutes at room temperature. Avoid direct exposure to light by wrapping the plate in aluminum foil.
Add 100 µl Stop Solution to each well of the plate
Read absorbance of each well on a spectrophotometer using 450 nm as the primary wavelength Optionally 620 nm (610 nm to 650 nm is acceptable) as the reference wavelength.

Calculate the mean absorbance for each set of duplicate standards and samples, and subtract the average zero standard optical density. Plot the standard curve on log-log graph paper, with standard concentration on the x-axis and absorbance on the y-axis. Draw the best-fit straight line through the standard points.
creator: Sandra Ross
